name: L.L.Bean® Mastercard®

verdict.text: Decent 4% at L.L.Bean, but weak elsewhere and store-locked redemption

earn_note: Unlike Macy's, Bloomingdale's, or Wayfair, L.L.Bean has issued this as a single open-loop Mastercard from the start; no separate closed-loop, store-only L.L.Bean card was found. New cardholders get 20% off their first L.L.Bean purchase upon approval. Each Bean Buck equals $1 in savings at L.L.Bean, and Bean Bucks don't expire as long as the account stays open and active.

redemption_options.method: Applied as savings toward a purchase at L.L.Bean or llbean.com

points.per_100k: Not applicable: Bean Bucks accrue and redeem in dollars directly, 1 Bean Buck = $1
points.note: Bean Bucks redeem only at L.L.Bean: no cash, statement credit, or third-party redemption. They don't expire while the account remains open, which is more forgiving than the 30-day expiration on some competing store-card currencies (e.g. Macy's Star Money).

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners: Bean Bucks redeem only at L.L.Bean.

insurance.detail: Not confirmed on Citi's or L.L.Bean's public product pages for this card
Not confirmed on Citi's or L.L.Bean's public product pages for this card

protection_note: A standard (not World Elite) Mastercard tier with no confirmed purchase protection, extended warranty, or travel insurance. Treat this as a rewards card with no meaningful insurance suite.
rental_note: No rental car coverage found for this card.

services.name: Free shipping at L.L.Bean
services.detail: Free standard shipping on L.L.Bean orders paid with this card.

services.name: Free return shipping
services.detail: Free return shipping on L.L.Bean orders paid with this card.

services.name: Free monogramming
services.detail: Complimentary monogramming on eligible L.L.Bean items when purchased with this card.

services.name: Foreign transaction fee
services.detail: Up to 3% on purchases made outside the US, per third-party reporting; not independently confirmed on Citi's rendered product page.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns rewards on their spend (into your account)
No dedicated insurance to share: this card doesn't carry a confirmed protection suite

additional_cards.note: Free to add, useful mainly for pooling a household's L.L.Bean spend toward the 4% rate and shared shipping perks.

timeline.text: Unlike Macy's, Bloomingdale's, or Wayfair, L.L.Bean does not appear to offer a separate closed-loop, store-only card; this open-loop Mastercard from Citi is the sole L.L.Bean-branded credit card product found.
